creator: sharky@schaack.io
text:
+@@ -8,5 +8,3 @@
+ psutil>=5.0.0
+ packaging>=21.3
+ looseversion
+-# We need contextvars for salt-ssh
+-contextvars

Why does the patch above include 

+ psutil>=5.0.0
+ packaging>=21.3
+ looseversion 

I don't think this is a requirement for contextvars .

Nevertheless, from my understanding we only need contextvars in the make file again and 3006 will work.
